summary: Mobile responsiveness and logo integration testing for Turkish Gallery CRM (Aslanbaş Oto). All tests passed: PWA manifest configured with 'ASLANBAŞ', logo integrated in login page and sidebar, comprehensive mobile UI verification across all screens. No truncated text, no overlapping buttons found.
passed_tests: Mobile Login (390x844): Logo visible above 'Giriş Yap' form, no old Car icon or 'Aslanbaş Oto' hero text - SUCCESS
Mobile Sidebar: After login, hamburger menu opens sidebar. Header shows ONLY logo image, no 'ASLANBAŞ' or 'Yönetim Paneli' text - SUCCESS
Mobile AddCarModal - Genel Tab: Tabs show shortened labels 'Genel | Ekspertiz | Foto | Sahiplik'. 2-column grid layout, all labels visible - SUCCESS
Mobile AddCarModal - Ekspertiz Tab: Car diagram with colored parts visible (ORJ/BOY/DEĞ), legend readable, mechanical dropdowns accessible - SUCCESS
Mobile AddCarModal - Sahiplik Tab: Radio cards (Stok Araç / Konsinye) stack vertically, fully readable with descriptions - SUCCESS
Mobile Finance Page: Summary cards (Gelir/Gider/Net) stacked vertically, search and filters visible, Excel export accessible - SUCCESS
Mobile Customers Page: Stats row (Toplam: 0, Pot: 0, Aktif: 0, Satış: 0) NOT truncated, search and add button visible - SUCCESS
Mobile Report Modal: PDF/Yazdır buttons visible, date pickers accessible, scope buttons wrap properly, financial summary readable - SUCCESS
Mobile Calendar Page: Calendar grid visible, month navigation (< >) working, Randevu Ekle button accessible - SUCCESS
Mobile Dashboard: Stat cards in 2-column grid, chart displays properly, bottom nav visible - SUCCESS
Mobile Promo Card: Car selector works, expertise diagram with colored parts (ORJ green, DEĞ red, BOY yellow) visible - SUCCESS
Desktop Login (1920x800): Logo visible, clean form layout - SUCCESS
Desktop Sidebar: Static sidebar visible with logo only in header - SUCCESS
Desktop AddCarModal: Full tab labels (Genel Bilgiler | Ekspertiz | Fotoğraflar | Sahiplik / Konsinye), 4-column grid, footer buttons side by side - SUCCESS
PWA Manifest: short_name='ASLANBAŞ', icons configured with logo192.png and logo512.png - SUCCESS
seed_data_creation: None - used existing BMW 320i test car with expertise data from previous iterations
context_for_next_testing_agent: All mobile responsiveness and logo integration verified working: 1) Login page shows logo image (h-28) replacing old hero section with Car icon 2) Sidebar header shows only logo, no text 3) AddCarModal tabs use CSS classes tab-label-full/tab-label-short for responsive labels 4) PWA manifest has short_name='ASLANBAŞ' with logo192/512.png icons 5) All screens tested on 390x844 mobile and 1920x800 desktop viewports 6) PromoCardModal uses dangerouslySetInnerHTML for SVG diagram to prevent span wrapping issues

mocked_apis.Email verification: MOCKED - verification code displayed on screen
